line: - There is no separate “rate limiting” API in the loop detector; the closest implemented mechanism is the bounded recent-tool-call history in `crates/saw-core/src/types.rs:13` and `crates/saw-core/src/types.rs:485`, which keeps loop scoring cheap.

line: - Used `classify(...)` from `crates/saw-core/src/classifier.rs:31` in the new tests so the acceptance criteria map to actual `ToolLoop`/`TestLoop` behavior, not just raw scores.
